summary: There is currently no formally established teaching or practicing model dedicated to retroperitoneoscopic nephrectomy based on recent literature reviews. Available resources focus broadly on similar retroperitoneal conditions without detailing specific simulations, VR tools, or structured curricula for this procedure.
